subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! When the Luminary of the Covenant shone forth from the Dayspring of the All-Merciful's Will, they that were possessed of insight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی چون نیر پیمان از مطلع اراده رحمن ساطع و لامع گردید اهل بصر حدت
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
